title: Migrating to OIDC
heading: Migrating to OIDC
content:
/\*! tailwindcss v4.1.17 | MIT License | https://tailwindcss.com \*/ @layer theme, base, components, utilities; @layer utilities;

> ❗️
> 
> ### 
> 
> Clever Complete Agreement Required
> 
> [](#clever-complete-agreement-required)
> 
> This feature is included with a Clever Complete subscription. Sign up [here](https://www.clever.com/developer-signup) or email your Application Success Manager to learn more.

Use this page to migrate an existing Clever SSO integration from OAuth 2.0 or SAML to OIDC.

> ❗️
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Before you start**
> 
> [](#before-you-start)
> 
> Make sure you understand how to use the `/userinfo` endpoint and how to obtain an `id_token`.
> 
> Your application must also have OIDC scopes enabled. If you are not sure whether your app is configured for OIDC, contact [Clever Support](https://support.clever.com).

## 

Migrate from OAuth 2.0 to OIDC

[](#migrate-from-oauth-20-to-oidc)

If your app already uses the standard Clever OAuth flow, you can move to OIDC in two ways:

-   Use the `access_token` returned from `POST /oauth/tokens` to call `https://api.clever.com/userinfo`
-   Decode the `id_token` returned from `POST /oauth/tokens` to obtain user identity data
    -   this requires OIDC scopes on your Clever SSO application

For implementation details, review:

-   [OAuth Implementation](https://dev.clever.com/docs/oauth-implementation)
-   [OIDC Implementation](https://dev.clever.com/docs/oidc-implementation)
-   [The /userinfo Endpoint](https://dev.clever.com/docs/the-userinfo-endpoint)

## 

Migrate from SAML to OIDC

[](#migrate-from-saml-to-oidc)

A Clever SSO application cannot support both SAML and OIDC on the same application.

If you want to move from SAML to OIDC, request a new OIDC-enabled application from [Clever Support](https://support.clever.com).

After you receive the new application, build and test your OIDC integration using the OIDC-specific documentation:

-   [OIDC Implementation](https://dev.clever.com/docs/oidc-implementation)
-   [The /userinfo Endpoint](https://dev.clever.com/docs/the-userinfo-endpoint)
